title: AI Co-Pilot: Your Digital Employee is Here! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof explores using Anthropic's Claude Tag feature as a digital employee co-pilot for workplace deployment. The feature supports internal data management and employee interactions through digital identity integration.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof looks at Anthropic's Claude Tag feature positioned as a digital employee co-pilot for workplace use. It covers how the feature handles internal data management and employee interactions through digital identity integration. The relevance lies in enterprise AI deployment: tying an AI assistant to a digital identity and curated internal data to support staff workflows.
